diary_entries.entry: Another year. Small meteorite impacts near colony. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.
Year 87 on Mars. Small meteorite impacts near colony. Morale is hopeful. We have 276 food units left.
Another year. Small meteorite impacts near colony. The colony feels hopeful. My hoarding grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Ares-18 (year 87): 'The sub-sim predicted our decision before we made it. Does that mean our decisions are predictable too — from above?'
